message:
test(wave-37): add 9 pure data-type tests for plan/extractor + obligation/guarded

plan/extractor: PlanCost Debug/Copy/Default/constants/add+sequential,
ExtractionCertificate Debug/Clone, ExtractionVerifyError Debug/Clone/Eq (5 tests)

obligation/guarded: TimeIndexedInvariant Debug/Copy/Hash (9 variants),
PreservationConstraint Debug/Clone, LeaseModel Debug/Clone,
ActorStepModel Debug/Clone/Default (4 tests)

B10 running total: 982 new tests committed (waves 9-37)
